description_long: This coffee machine features a robust, cylindrical body with vertically ribbed black metal panels and a rounded top. The front is equipped with a prominent portafilter handle, a steam wand, and several control dials and gauges, all arranged for easy access. A metallic drip tray with perforations sits below the brewing area, while a transparent splash guard rises at the back, providing protection during operation. The machine's top is adorned with a wooden-handled lever, adding a classic touch to its industrial design. Brass or bronze accents highlight the edges and functional components, giving the machine a vintage, high-end appearance. The base is solid and slightly wider, ensuring stability on countertops in urban cafes or public spaces.
description: A vintage-style, black metal coffee machine with ribbed panels, brass accents, and a wooden-handled lever, featuring a portafilter, steam wand, and control dials on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ribbed metal body, wooden lever handle, and partial visibility of the control dials and portafilter.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the curved ribbed back panel, transparent splash guard, and the top-mounted lever handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the ribbed body, lever handle, and clearer view of the steam wand and control dials.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the portafilter, steam wand, control dials, gauges, and the perforated drip tray beneath the brewing area.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Willoughsby' is visible on the lower front panel, suggesting a brand logo in black text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel features several round dials and gauges symmetrically arranged on the front, with a lever handle at the top center and a portafilter below.
